meaning: Simple and straightforward, 'hi' is often used as a quick greeting in English amongst friends, coworkers, and even family.
ng'anamulo: Mwambura kusuzga ndiposo mwakudunjika, 'hi' kanandi ŵakumutawuzga mwaluŵiro mu Cingelezi pakati pa ŵabwezi, awo ŵakugwira nawo nchito, nanga mbabali ŵawo

meaning: This is another one of the best greetings to use amongst friends or acquaintances.
ng'anamulo: Ici nchimoza mwa vitawuzgo viwemi comene ivyo mungagwiliskira nchito pakati pa ŵabwezi panji ŵabwezi ŵinu

meaning: A more casual way of saying 'Good morning.'.
ng'anamulo: Nthowa yakufwatuka comene yakuyowoyera kuti 'Muŵe na mulenji uwemi.'

meaning: This is one of the more casual greeting phrases used in an exchange.
ng'anamulo: Iyi njimoza mwa mazgu ghakutawuzga ghambura kumanyikwa agho ghakugwiriskirika ncito pakusinthana

meaning: Similar to 'how are things?', 'what's new?' is simply a way of saying hello to someone you haven't talked to in a while.
ng'anamulo: Kuyana waka na 'vinthu vili wuli?', 'nchivici ciphya?' ni nthowa waka yakutawuzgira munthu uyo ​​mwaŵa kuti mundayowoye nayo kwa nyengo yitali

meaning: As you may have assumed, this one is used when you haven't seen someone in a while.
ng'anamulo: Nga umo mungaghanaghanirapo, iyi yikugwiriskirika ncito para mwaŵa kuti mundamuwonepo munthu kwa nyengo yitali

meaning: This is short for 'Good day,' typically used in Australia.
ng'anamulo: Ici nchifupikizgo ca 'Zuŵa Liwemi,' ilo kanandi ŵakugwiliskira nchito ku Australia

meaning: No list of English greetings vocabulary is complete without some unique variations. This is one that's commonly used in the southern regions of the United States.
ng'anamulo: Palije mndandanda wa mazgu ghakutawuzga gha Chingelezi agho ghakukwana kwambura kusintha kwapadera. Iyi ndiyo nthowa iyo ŵakugwiliskira nchito comene mu vigaŵa vya kumwera kwa United States

meaning: This can also be shortened to '‘Sup?'.
ng'anamulo: Ici cingafupikiskikaso kuŵa '‘mbuni?'

meaning: This is one of those types of greetings that doesn't always need to be taken literally.
ng'anamulo: Iyi njimoza mwa mitundu ya kutawuzga iyo nyengo zose yikukhumbikwira yayi kutoleka nga umo vikuŵira

meaning: Although a question, this type of greeting can be used in place of 'hello!'.
ng'anamulo: Nangauli ni fumbo, kweni mtundu uwu wa kutawuzga ungagwiliskirika nchito m'malo mwa 'monile!'

meaning: This one is popular in Ireland.
ng'anamulo: Iyi yikumanyikwa chomene ku Ireland

meaning: Another one of the simplest greetings words you can use.
ng'anamulo: Linyake mwa mazgu ghapusu ghakutawuzga agho mungagwiliskira nchito

meaning: In formal greetings examples, hello is preferred to 'hi' or 'hey.'.
ng'anamulo: Mu viyelezgero vya kutawuzga, monile wakutemwa chomene

meaning: This is a slightly less formal way to say hello, but still more appropriate than using 'hey.'.
ng'anamulo: Iyi ni nthowa yambura kumanyikwa makora yakutawuzga, kweni njakwenelera comene kuluska kuyowoya kuti 'Boh.'

meaning: You can never go wrong when using 'good morning' in greeting sentences.
ng'anamulo: Mungabudiska yayi para mukugwiliskira nchito mazgu ghakuti 'muŵe na mulenji uwemi' pa mazgu ghakutawuzga

meaning: If greeting someone later in the day, this is a great option.
ng'anamulo: Usange mukutawuzga munthu munyake pamanyuma pa zuŵa, ichi nchisankho chiwemi chomene

meaning: If greeting someone during the evening, use this option.
ng'anamulo: Usange mukutawuzga munthu munyake mazuŵa ghano, gwiliskirani nchito nthowa iyi

meaning: Just don't say this one to someone you've met three times before!
ng'anamulo: Lekani kuyowoya waka fundo iyi kwa munthu uyo ​​mwakumana nayo katatu!

english: It's a pleasure to meet you.
meaning: Remember, these last two only work when you are meeting someone for the first time.
ng'anamulo: Kumbukani kuti viŵiri vyaumaliro ivi vikugwira ntchito pekha para mukukumana na munthu kakwamba

meaning: This is used when wishing someone a good night.
ng'anamulo: Ici cikugwiriskirika ncito para munthu wakukhumbira munthu usiku uwemi

meaning: This is used when wishing someone a good night.
ng'anamulo: Ici cikugwiriskirika ncito para munthu wakukhumbira munthu usiku uwemi
